script.name: !repair.repairobject
script.sourceplaintext:
gosub sub.CheckTargetExists
$debug = 9898
$isStationary = [FALSE] if $victim -> is of class Ship if $victim -> is stationary flagged $isStationary = [TRUE] else if not $victim -> get max speed $isStationary = [TRUE] end else if $victim -> is of class Station $isStationary = [TRUE] else if $victim -> is of class Gate $isStationary = [TRUE] else return null end
$iskhaakthinker = [THIS] -> is of class Kha'ak Cluster
$sizeThis = [THIS] -> get size of object $sizeVictim = $victim -> get size of object $followdist = 2500 + $sizeThis + ( $sizeVictim / 2 ) $sizeVictim = $sizeVictim * 12 / 10 $distToFireFrom = get range of laser Repair Laser if ( $sizeVictim * 12 / 10 ) < $distToFireFrom $distToFireFrom = $sizeVictim * 12 / 10 else if $sizeVictim < 5000 $distToFireFrom = $distToFireFrom * 8 / 10 else $distToFireFrom = $distToFireFrom * 99 / 100 end
write to log file #$debug append=[TRUE] printf: fmt='Distance to fire repair laser from: %s', $distToFireFrom, null, null, null, null
set script command target: null $hullMax = $victim -> get max hull
$speedMax = [THIS] -> get max speed $speed1 = 40 do if $speed1 > $speedMax $speed1 = $speedMax $speed2 = 90 do if $speed2 > $speedMax $speed2 = $speedMax $speed3 = 150 do if $speed3 > $speedMax $speed3 = $speedMax
gosub sub.InitLaserArray $dockingAttempts = 0 $subtype = [THIS] -> get subtype
* Setup race switching in case repairer is same race as target - repair laser has no effect on same race in active sector. if [OWNER] != Player $raceVictim = $victim -> get owner race if $raceVictim == [OWNER] [THIS] ->set local variable: name='repair-original-race' value=[OWNER] $raceTemp = Other $prepend = 'Workaround race: ' + $raceTemp @ = [THIS] -> call script plugin.jj.lib.log.object : prepend=$prepend logFile=$debug
$relations = table alloc $races = get race array: include fixed=[TRUE], include corporations=[TRUE], include player=[TRUE] $i = size of array $races while $i dec $i = $race = $races[$i] $relation = [THIS] -> get relation to race $race $relations[$race] = $relation write to log file #9898 append=[TRUE] printf: fmt='Relation to race %s is %s.', $race, $relation, null, null, null end
$relationThisToVictim = [THIS] -> get relation to object $victim $relationVictimToThis = $victim -> get relation to object [THIS]
$prepend = 'This relation to victim: ' + $relationThisToVictim + ' | Victim relation to this: ' + $relationVictimToThis @ = [THIS] -> call script plugin.jj.lib.log.object : prepend=$prepend logFile=$debug end end
$taskCheck = [THIS] -> get next available task: starting=[Task.StartFree] [THIS] ->start task $taskCheck with script !repair.repairobject.check and prio 100: arg1=$victim arg2=$isStationary arg3=null arg4=null arg5=null
* Main loop while [TRUE] StartMainLoop: gosub sub.CheckTargetExists
[THIS] ->set attack target to null
$hull = $victim -> get hull skip if $hull < $hullMax break
if [THIS] -> is docked @ = [THIS] -> call script !move.undock : @ = wait randomly from 100 to 200 ms continue end
if not [THIS] -> is in same sector as $victim gosub sub.RaceSwitchBack $sector = $victim -> get sector skip if $follow break $sector = get next sector on route from sector [SECTOR] to sector $sector if $sector @ = [THIS] -> fly to sector $sector else @ = [THIS] -> move around 60000 ms end @ = wait randomly from 100 to 200 ms continue end
if not $victim -> is in a sector gosub sub.RaceSwitchBack $time = random value from 5000 to 10000 - 1 @ = [THIS] -> move around $time ms end
set script command target: $victim * special for khaak thinkers if $iskhaakthinker @ $ret = [THIS] -> follow $victim with precision 6000 m : timeout=30000 ms if $ret != FLRET_TARGETREACHED @ = wait randomly from 100 to 200 ms else = [THIS] -> decouple ships * this task is stopped, so the following should not be necessary while 1 @ = wait 999999 ms end end continue end
if [THIS] -> is in active sector if $isStationary [THIS] ->set attack target to $victim
[THIS] ->add secondary signal: signal=SIGNAL_KILLED, script=!ship.signal.killed.dronerepairer, prio=100, name='Repair.Signal' $victim ->add secondary signal: signal=SIGNAL_REPAIRED, script=!stationary.signal.repaired, prio=100, name='Repair.Signal' $repairers = $victim -> get local variable: name='repairers' skip if $repairers $repairers = array alloc: size=0 if not find [THIS] in array: $repairers append [THIS] to array $repairers $victim ->set local variable: name='repairers' value=$repairers end
$sector = $victim -> get sector if $dockingAttempts > 3 gosub sub.RepairStationFlyTowards else if $victim -> has a free ship dock port: ship subtype = $subtype gosub sub.RepairStationWithDocking else gosub sub.RepairStationFlyTowards end continue end end
$dist = get distance between [THIS] and $victim if $dist > $followdist AND $isStationary != [TRUE] gosub sub.RaceSwitchBack @ $ret = [THIS] -> follow $victim with precision $followdist m : timeout=60000 ms if $ret != FLRET_TARGETREACHED @ = wait randomly from 10 to 20 ms continue end end
[THIS] ->set attack target to $victim if [THIS] -> is in active sector * Not stationary target $desiredspeed = [THIS] -> get current speed * = [THIS]-> call script 'plugin.jj.lib.log.object' : prepend='Before Attack Run' logFile=$debug * if $victim-> is of class [Moveable Ship] $rand = random value from 15 to 35 - 1 $desiredspeed = $desiredspeed + $rand $timeout = random value from 10000 to 60000 - 1 gosub sub.RaceSwitchToTemp @ $fire = [THIS] -> attack run on target $victim : timeout=$timeoutms speedlimit=$desiredspeed * = [THIS]-> call script 'plugin.jj.lib.log.object' : prepend='After Attack Run' logFile=$debug else * Not in active sector gosub sub.RaceSwitchBack @ $fire = [THIS] -> attack run on target $victim : timeout=60000 ms end gosub sub.CheckTargetExists if $fire == FLRET_FIREFREE gosub sub.FireLasersTarget else if $fire == FLRET_BREAK @ = wait randomly from 50 to 100 ms end end
gosub sub.Return
return null
* ========================================================================= * Repair stationary object, approach by flying toward centre of station. Higher chance of clipping through target geometry. * ========================================================================= sub.RepairStationFlyTowards: @ = [THIS] -> call script plugin.jj.lib.log.object : prepend='Attempt repair fly towards' logFile=$debug $dist = get distance between [THIS] and $victim if $dist < $distToFireFrom @ = [THIS] -> call script plugin.jj.lib.log.object : prepend='Already close enough to target' logFile=$debug @ = [THIS] -> call script lib.rotateobject : Object 1=[THIS] Object 2=$victim Offset Rotation=null Rotate Obj1 Smoothly=[TRUE] gosub sub.FireInActiveSector endsub end
$tasks = [THIS] ->get all tasks with script on stack=!move.movetoposition gosub sub.CheckTasks $x = $victim -> get x position $y = $victim -> get y position $z = $victim -> get z position $prepend = 'Move to centre of station x: ' + $x + ', y: ' + $y + ', z: ' + $z @ = [THIS] -> call script plugin.jj.lib.log.object : prepend=$prepend logFile=$debug [THIS] ->ignore collisions: [TRUE] $precision = get maximum, $distToFireFrom, $sizeVictim, 0, 0, 0 $task = [THIS] -> get next available task: starting=[Task.StartFree] [THIS] ->start task $task with script !move.movetoposition and prio 100: arg1=$sector arg2=$x arg3=$y arg4=$z arg5=$precision $distOld = $sizeVictim $i = 0 while $dist > $distToFireFrom gosub sub.CheckLoop if not [THIS] ->is named script '!move.movetoposition' on stack of task=$task @ = [THIS] -> call script plugin.jj.lib.log.object : prepend='Finished move.movetoposition' logFile=$debug break end
$distOld = $dist if $dist > $distOld * Travelling away from target, time to break inc $i = if $i > 5 break @ = [THIS] -> call script plugin.jj.lib.log.object : prepend='Travelling away from target, time to break' logFile=$debug end end
$distVertex = [THIS] ->get distance in active sector to nearest vertex: object=$victim if $distVertex < 400 @ = [THIS] -> call script plugin.jj.lib.log.object : prepend='Too close to vertex' logFile=$debug break end
gosub sub.CheckDocking
@ = wait randomly from 2000 to 4000 ms $dist = get distance between [THIS] and $victim end gosub sub.MoveStop @ = [THIS] -> call script lib.rotateobject : Object 1=[THIS] Object 2=$victim Offset Rotation=null Rotate Obj1 Smoothly=[TRUE] * Movetoposition failed, so get closer with repeated jolts towards station. if $dist > $distToFireFrom @ = [THIS] -> call script plugin.jj.lib.log.object : prepend='Movetoposition failed, try jolting' logFile=$debug * gosub sub.MoveLaterally: while $dist > $distToFireFrom gosub sub.CheckLoop gosub sub.CheckDocking $distVertex = [THIS] ->get distance in active sector to nearest vertex: object=$victim if $distVertex > 1800 $speed = $speedMax else if $distVertex > 1200 $speed = $speed3 else if $distVertex > 600 $speed = $speed2 else @ = [THIS] -> call script plugin.jj.lib.log.object : prepend='Repairer < 600m from vertex' logFile=$debug * Hopefully 600m from vertex is close enough break end @ = [THIS] -> call script plugin.jj.lib.log.object : prepend='Jolting repairer' logFile=$debug [THIS] ->set ship speed to $speed @ = wait randomly from 500 to 1500 ms $dist = get distance between [THIS] and $victim end gosub sub.MoveLaterally [THIS] ->set desired speed: 0 @ = [THIS] -> call script lib.rotateobject : Object 1=[THIS] Object 2=$victim Offset Rotation=null Rotate Obj1 Smoothly=[TRUE] gosub sub.RandomiseAngle @ = [THIS] -> call script lib.rotateobject.smooth : =$alpha =$beta =$gamma @ = wait 500 ms [THIS] ->ignore collisions: [FALSE] end gosub sub.FireInActiveSector endsub
* =========================================== * Repair stationary object, approach for docking then abort when close * =========================================== sub.RepairStationWithDocking: $closeToClamp = [FALSE] $dist = get distance between [THIS] and $victim if $dist > $distToFireFrom @ = [THIS] -> call script plugin.jj.lib.log.object : prepend='Yes free dock port, attempt docking' logFile=$debug
$tasks = [THIS] ->get all tasks with script on stack=!move.movetostation gosub sub.CheckTasks
$task = [THIS] -> get next available task: starting=[Task.StartFree] [THIS] ->start task $task with script !move.movetostation and prio 100: arg1=$victim arg2=null arg3=null arg4=null arg5=null while $dist > $distToFireFrom gosub sub.CheckLoop $distVertex = [THIS] ->get distance in active sector to nearest vertex: object=$victim if $distVertex < 700 $closeToClamp = [TRUE] gosub sub.RandomiseAngle break end if not [THIS] ->is named script '!move.movetostation' on stack of task=$task if [THIS] -> is docked @ = [THIS] -> call script !move.undock : @ = wait randomly from 100 to 200 ms else * Evidently we cannot dock for some reason. $dockingAttempts = 1000 end break end $dist = get distance between [THIS] and $victim @ = wait randomly from 3000 to 4000 ms end
* Has not happened in all testing, but worth checking just in case. if [THIS] -> is docked @ = [THIS] -> call script !move.undock : @ = wait randomly from 100 to 200 ms end end
gosub sub.MoveStop
if $closeToClamp gosub sub.MoveLaterally @ = [THIS] -> call script lib.rotateobject.smooth : =$alpha =$beta =$gamma gosub sub.FireInActiveSector else if $dist <= $distToFireFrom @ = [THIS] -> call script lib.rotateobject : Object 1=[THIS] Object 2=$victim Offset Rotation=null Rotate Obj1 Smoothly=[TRUE] gosub sub.MoveLaterally gosub sub.FireInActiveSector else gosub sub.EscapeTarget end inc $dockingAttempts = endsub
* ==================== * Fire repair lasers in active sector * ==================== sub.FireInActiveSector: @ = [THIS] -> call script plugin.jj.lib.log.object : prepend='Fire in active sector' logFile=$debug [THIS] ->ignore collisions: [FALSE] $fireAhead = [TRUE] $misses = 0 $lateralMoves = 0 $i = 0 gosub sub.RaceSwitchToTemp
while $hull < $hullMax if $fireAhead * = [THIS]-> call script 'plugin.jj.lib.log.object' : prepend='Firing Ahead' logFile=$debug gosub sub.FireLasersAhead else * = [THIS]-> call script 'plugin.jj.lib.log.object' : prepend='Firing on target' logFile=$debug gosub sub.FireLasersTarget end
* Repair laser fires 300rp, = 1round per 200ms @ = wait randomly from 200 to 250 ms $hull = $victim -> get hull
$lastRepaired = [THIS] -> get local variable: name='last-repair-hit' if $lastRepaired $time = [THIS] -> get flight time if $time < ( $lastRepaired + 10 ) $misses = 0 continue end end
inc $misses = * allow laser several loop cycles to get a hit. inc $i = do if $i < 20 continue if $fireAhead $fireAhead = [FALSE] @ = [THIS] -> call script lib.rotateobject : Object 1=[THIS] Object 2=$victim Offset Rotation=null Rotate Obj1 Smoothly=[TRUE] @ = [THIS] -> call script plugin.jj.lib.log.object : prepend='Switch to fire on target' logFile=$debug else $fireAhead = [TRUE] @ = [THIS] -> call script plugin.jj.lib.log.object : prepend='Switch to fire ahead' logFile=$debug end $i = 0
if not $fire @ = [THIS] -> call script plugin.jj.lib.log.object : prepend='Fired failed, rotate drone' logFile=$debug gosub sub.CheckLoop continue end
$distVertex = [THIS] ->get distance in active sector to nearest vertex: object=$victim if $distVertex > 1200 $speed = $speedMax else if $distVertex > 600 $speed = $speed3 else if $distVertex > 400 $speed = $speed2 if $lateralMoves < 4 gosub sub.MoveLaterally @ = [THIS] -> call script lib.rotateobject : Object 1=[THIS] Object 2=$victim Offset Rotation=null Rotate Obj1 Smoothly=[TRUE] inc $lateralMoves = end else if $distVertex > 150 $speed = $speed1 else @ = [THIS] -> call script plugin.jj.lib.log.object : prepend='Repairer too close, start loop again' logFile=$debug break end
@ = [THIS] -> call script plugin.jj.lib.log.object : prepend='Jolting repairer' logFile=$debug * Jolt ship towards target [THIS] ->set ship speed to $speed @ = wait 500 ms if $misses > 800 @ = [THIS] -> call script plugin.jj.lib.log.object : prepend='Too many laser fire attempts' logFile=$debug break end end gosub sub.RaceSwitchBack gosub sub.EscapeTarget endsub
* ============== * Escape from station without dying. * ============== sub.EscapeTarget: gosub sub.CheckLoop @ = [THIS] -> call script plugin.jj.lib.log.object : prepend='Escaping target1' logFile=$debug $dist = get distance between [THIS] and $victim do if $dist > $followdist endsub $posVictim = $victim -> get position as array
$pos = $posVictim[0] $posThis = [THIS] -> get x position gosub sub.GetEscapePos $xPos = $pos
$pos = $posVictim[1] $posThis = [THIS] -> get y position gosub sub.GetEscapePos $yPos = $pos
$pos = $posVictim[2] $posThis = [THIS] -> get z position gosub sub.GetEscapePos $zPos = $pos * $message = sprintf: fmt='Repair Flying Away from %s. x: %s y: %s z: %s', $victim, $xPos, $yPos, $zPos, null * = [THIS]-> call script 'plugin.jj.lib.log.object' : prepend=$message logFile=9595
$tasks = [THIS] ->get all tasks with script on stack=!move.movetoposition gosub sub.CheckTasks $task = [THIS] -> get next available task: starting=[Task.StartFree] [THIS] ->start task $task with script !move.movetoposition and prio 100: arg1=$sector arg2=$xPos arg3=$yPos arg4=$zPos arg5=3000 [THIS] ->ignore collisions: [TRUE] while $dist < $followdist @ = wait 4000 ms skip if [THIS] ->is named script '!move.movetoposition' on stack of task=$task break $dist = [THIS] -> get distance to: position array=$posVictim end gosub sub.EndTasks [THIS] ->ignore collisions: [FALSE] @ = [THIS] -> call script plugin.jj.lib.log.object : prepend='Escaped target' logFile=$debug endsub
* ============================================================================ * Ship continues flying toward clamp after abandoning docking so we run "move to position" to current position to truly stop it. * ============================================================================ sub.MoveStop: @ = [THIS] -> call script plugin.jj.lib.log.object : prepend='Move Stop' logFile=$debug [THIS] ->ignore collisions: [TRUE] @ = wait 100 ms [THIS] ->set desired speed: 0 gosub sub.EndTasks [THIS] ->set desired speed: 0 $x = [THIS] -> get x position $y = [THIS] -> get y position $z = [THIS] -> get z position @ $flret = [THIS] -> move to position: x=$x y=$y z=$z with precision 3000 m
* Wait till we stop turning while [TRUE] @ = [THIS] -> call script plugin.jj.lib.log.object : prepend='Still turning' logFile=$debug $turningOld = [THIS] -> get rot alpha @ = wait 500 ms $turning = [THIS] -> get rot alpha do if $turning == $turningOld break end endsub
* ==================== * Jolt laterally in a random direction to help prevent drones getting clogged up together * ==================== sub.MoveLaterally: $rand = random value from 0 to 4 - 1 skip if $rand endsub [THIS] ->set desired speed: 0 $offset = array alloc: size=3 $rand = random value from 0 to 2 - 1 do if random value from 0 to 2 - 1 $offset[0] = 16384 do if random value from 0 to 2 - 1 $offset[1] = -16384 @ = [THIS] -> call script lib.rotateobject : Object 1=[THIS] Object 2=$victim Offset Rotation=$offset Rotate Obj1 Smoothly=[TRUE] [THIS] ->set ship speed to $speed3 @ = wait 3000 ms if random value from 0 to 2 - 1 [THIS] ->set ship speed to $speed2 @ = wait 3000 ms end endsub
* ============================================= * Take current ship's angle and randomise it a little * ============================================= sub.RandomiseAngle: * about 18 degrees randomisation either direction $alpha = [THIS] -> get rot alpha $rand = random value from -3000 to 3001 - 1 $alpha = $alpha + $rand $beta = [THIS] -> get rot beta $rand = random value from -3000 to 3001 - 1 $beta = $beta + $rand $gamma = [THIS] -> get rot gamma $rand = random value from -3000 to 3001 - 1 $gamma = $gamma + $rand endsub * ==================== * Get x,y or z coordinate away from station * ==================== sub.GetEscapePos: if $posThis > $pos $pos = $pos + $followdist else $pos = $pos - $followdist end endsub
* ==================== * Check repair target exists * ==================== sub.CheckTargetExists: skip if $victim -> exists gosub sub.Return endsub
* ==================== * Check repair target exists * ==================== sub.CheckLoop: gosub sub.CheckTargetExists if [THIS] -> is in active sector if [THIS] -> is in same sector as $victim do if $victim -> is in a sector endsub end end gosub sub.RaceSwitchBack gosub sub.EndTasks goto label StartMainLoop endsub
* ==================== * Return with some clean up * ==================== sub.Return: skip if $isStationary $victim = null @ = [THIS] -> call script !repair.repairobject.finish : =$victim return null endsub
* ==================== * Check docking * ==================== sub.CheckDocking: do if $dockingAttempts > 3 endsub if not [THIS] -> is docking allowed at $victim @ = [THIS] -> call script plugin.jj.lib.log.object : prepend='Docking not allowed' logFile=$debug endsub end skip if $victim -> has a free ship dock port: ship subtype = $subtype endsub if not $victim -> is docking possible of [THIS] @ = [THIS] -> call script plugin.jj.lib.log.object : prepend='Docking not possible' logFile=$debug endsub end @ = [THIS] -> call script plugin.jj.lib.log.object : prepend='Abandon flying towards station and try docking' logFile=$debug gosub sub.EndTasks gosub sub.EscapeTarget gosub sub.RepairStationWithDocking endsub
* ======== * Setup lasers array * ======== sub.InitLaserArray: $t = [THIS] -> get number of turrets $aTurrets = array alloc: size=$t while $t dec $t = $s = [THIS] -> get max. number of lasers in turret $t $aSlots = array alloc: size=$s $aTurrets[$t] = $aSlots end endsub
* ======== * Remove lasers * ======== sub.RemoveLasers: $t = size of array $aTurrets while $t dec $t = $aSlots = $aTurrets[$t] $s = size of array $aSlots while $s dec $s = $aSlots[$s] = null $laser = [THIS] -> get laser type in turret $t at slot $s if $laser AND $laser != Repair Laser $aSlots[$s] = $laser [THIS] ->switch laser in turret $t gun $s to null end end end endsub
* ========== * Restore lasers * ========== sub.RestoreLasers: $t = size of array $aTurrets while $t dec $t = $aSlots = $aTurrets[$t] $s = size of array $aSlots while $s dec $s = $laser = $aSlots[$s] do if $laser = [THIS] ->install laser, turret=$t, slot=$s, laser=$laser end end $aTurrets = null endsub
* ========== * Fire lasers at target * ========== sub.FireLasersTarget: gosub sub.RemoveLasers $fire = [THIS] -> fire lasers on target $victim using turret null gosub sub.RestoreLasers endsub
* ========== * Fire lasers ahead * ========== sub.FireLasersAhead: gosub sub.RemoveLasers $fire = [THIS] -> fire laser of turret null ahead gosub sub.RestoreLasers endsub
* ============================= * End movetostation and or movetoposition tasks * ============================= sub.EndTasks: do if [THIS] ->is named script '!move.movetostation' on stack of task=$task [THIS] ->start task $task with script !lib.interrupt and prio 100: arg1=null arg2=null arg3=null arg4=null arg5=null do if [THIS] ->is named script '!move.movetoposition' on stack of task=$task [THIS] ->start task $task with script !lib.interrupt and prio 100: arg1=null arg2=null arg3=null arg4=null arg5=null endsub
* ============================================= * Movetostation or movetoposition tasks are running, so end them * ============================================= sub.CheckTasks: $n = size of array $tasks while $n dec $n = $task = $tasks[$n] gosub sub.EndTasks end endsub
* =============================================== * Workaround for repair laser not repairing when shooting target of same race * =============================================== sub.RaceSwitchToTemp: skip if $raceTemp endsub $race = [THIS] -> get owner race do if $race == $raceTemp endsub [THIS] ->set owner race to $raceTemp $key = get next key: table=$relations key=null while $key $relation = $relations[$key] * Seems unncessary but better to be safe than sorry. [THIS] ->set relation against $key to $relation $key = get next key: table=$relations key=$key end [THIS] ->set relation against $victim to $relationThisToVictim $victim ->set relation against [THIS] to $relationVictimToThis [THIS] ->set relation against [HOMEBASE] to Friend [HOMEBASE] ->set relation against [THIS] to Friend endsub
* =============================================== * Switch race back to original race * =============================================== sub.RaceSwitchBack: skip if $raceTemp endsub $race = [THIS] -> get owner race if $race == $raceTemp [THIS] ->set owner race to $raceVictim @ = [THIS] -> call script plugin.jj.lib.log.object : prepend='Changed race back to owner' logFile=$debug end endsub return null

comment.var: Setup race switching in case repairer is same race as target - repair laser has no effect on same race in active sector.
Main loop

line.text: get next sector on route from sector

comment.var: special for khaak thinkers
this task is stopped, so the following should not be necessary

line.text: has a free ship dock port: ship subtype =

comment.var: Not stationary target
= [THIS]-> call script 'plugin.jj.lib.log.object' : prepend='Before Attack Run' logFile=$debug
if $victim-> is of class [Moveable Ship]
= [THIS]-> call script 'plugin.jj.lib.log.object' : prepend='After Attack Run' logFile=$debug
Not in active sector
Repair stationary object, approach by flying toward centre of station. Higher chance of clipping through target geometry.

line.text: get all tasks with script on stack=

comment.var: Travelling away from target, time to break

line.var: 'Travelling away from target, time to break'

line.text: get distance in active sector to nearest vertex: object=

comment.var: Movetoposition failed, so get closer with repeated jolts towards station.
gosub sub.MoveLaterally:

line.text: get distance in active sector to nearest vertex: object=

comment.var: Hopefully 600m from vertex is close enough
Repair stationary object, approach for docking then abort when close

line.text: get all tasks with script on stack=
get distance in active sector to nearest vertex: object=

comment.var: Evidently we cannot dock for some reason.
Has not happened in all testing, but worth checking just in case.
Fire repair lasers in active sector
= [THIS]-> call script 'plugin.jj.lib.log.object' : prepend='Firing Ahead' logFile=$debug
= [THIS]-> call script 'plugin.jj.lib.log.object' : prepend='Firing on target' logFile=$debug
Repair laser fires 300rp, = 1round per 200ms
allow laser several loop cycles to get a hit.

line.text: get distance in active sector to nearest vertex: object=

comment.var: Jolt ship towards target
Escape from station without dying.
$message = sprintf: fmt='Repair Flying Away from %s. x: %s y: %s z: %s', $victim, $xPos, $yPos, $zPos, null
= [THIS]-> call script 'plugin.jj.lib.log.object' : prepend=$message logFile=9595

line.text: get all tasks with script on stack=

comment.var: Ship continues flying toward clamp after abandoning docking so we run "move to position" to current position to truly stop it.
Wait till we stop turning
Jolt laterally in a random direction to help prevent drones getting clogged up together
Take current ship's angle and randomise it a little
about 18 degrees randomisation either direction
Get x,y or z coordinate away from station
Check repair target exists
Check repair target exists
Return with some clean up
Check docking

line.text: has a free ship dock port: ship subtype =

line.var: 'Abandon flying towards station and try docking'

comment.var: Setup lasers array

line.text: get max. number of lasers in turret

comment.var: Remove lasers
Restore lasers
Fire lasers at target
Fire lasers ahead
End movetostation and or movetoposition tasks
Movetostation or movetoposition tasks are running, so end them
Workaround for repair laser not repairing when shooting target of same race
Seems unncessary but better to be safe than sorry.
Switch race back to original race

sval.val: Distance to fire repair laser from: %s
Move to centre of station x:
Travelling away from target, time to break
Yes free dock port, attempt docking
Repairer too close, start loop again
Abandon flying towards station and try docking
Setup race switching in case repairer is same race as target - repair laser has no effect on same race in active sector.
this task is stopped, so the following should not be necessary
= [THIS]-> call script 'plugin.jj.lib.log.object' : prepend='Before Attack Run' logFile=$debug
= [THIS]-> call script 'plugin.jj.lib.log.object' : prepend='After Attack Run' logFile=$debug
Repair stationary object, approach by flying toward centre of station. Higher chance of clipping through target geometry.
Travelling away from target, time to break
Movetoposition failed, so get closer with repeated jolts towards station.
Hopefully 600m from vertex is close enough
Repair stationary object, approach for docking then abort when close
Evidently we cannot dock for some reason.
Has not happened in all testing, but worth checking just in case.
Fire repair lasers in active sector
= [THIS]-> call script 'plugin.jj.lib.log.object' : prepend='Firing on target' logFile=$debug
allow laser several loop cycles to get a hit.
$message = sprintf: fmt='Repair Flying Away from %s. x: %s y: %s z: %s', $victim, $xPos, $yPos, $zPos, null
Ship continues flying toward clamp after abandoning docking so we run "move to position" to current position to truly stop it.
Jolt laterally in a random direction to help prevent drones getting clogged up together
Take current ship's angle and randomise it a little
Get x,y or z coordinate away from station
End movetostation and or movetoposition tasks
Movetostation or movetoposition tasks are running, so end them
Workaround for repair laser not repairing when shooting target of same race
Seems unncessary but better to be safe than sorry.
Switch race back to original race
